title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE - 211info
text: EUGENE OFFICE OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care to qualifying older adults living in their homes. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, and meal preparation. Also offers case management to help older adults make cost-effective and appropriate decisions regarding their care needs. Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and local funding amounts. Hours may range from 5-20 hours a month. Some examples of when Oregon Project Independence may be appropriate: -When an individual requires personal and home care assistance due to injury or illness -When an individual has been hospitalized and needs help while recovering in their home 1015 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: -Age 60 and older, and individuals of any age diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease or a related disorder -Ages 19-59 individuals who have physical disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3353 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3353 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information; some services may have a waitlist FEES: Fees based on sliding scale. The cost is based on monthly household income minus monthly medical costs. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Alzheimer's Disease Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Dementia Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Housekeeping Assistance * Alzheimer's Disease Housekeeping Assistance * Dementia Housekeeping Assistance * Older Adults In Home Meal Preparation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions In Home Meal Preparation * Alzheimer's Disease In Home Meal Preparation * Dementia In Home Meal Preparation * Older Adults Personal Care * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Personal Care * Alzheimer's Disease Personal Care * Dementia Personal Care * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - MEDICAID PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP UTILITIES - SENIOR CONNECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
